“The Treasurer role is  very
manageable when the
responsibilities are shared and
leveraged systems in place.
There is training to support
you in the role. We have a
wonderful and collaborative e-
Board.”
“Whether you’re new or returning tothe e-board, Membership is a greatrole to jump into. The commitmentis very limited and the process isturnkey and you’ll receive all thesupport you need. Plus you have thepleasure of getting to know newparents and sharing the perks ofbeing on the PTA. You got this!”
- Sarah Falk,
Current Treasurer
- Raquel Hudson,Current Membership ChairWe collaborate, support, and help each We collaborate, support, and help each We collaborate, support, and help each
